pptWorkspace.blankHint: Screen blanked · Press B or click to restore
pptWorkspace.shortcuts: ← → slides · N notes · B blank · Esc exit
pptWorkspace.noNotes: This slide does not have speaker notes yet.
pptWorkspace.loading: Loading the same-source deck and slide structure
pptWorkspace.emptyDescription: Compile a classroom-ready PPT from the course goals, content, knowledge, and understanding checks.
pptWorkspace.qualityBlocked: The deck did not pass the classroom-readiness check, so the system kept the problem version unpublished. Adjust the course content and try again.

courseLibrary.title: Choose a course and continue learning
courseLibrary.subtitle: Course generation continues in the background when you leave this page.
courseLibrary.emptyBody: Create a course or import Markdown to begin.

resume.locationFallback: Return to your last learning position

courseLibrary.createPrompt: Enter a topic to learn. The course will generate in the background.
courseLibrary.createStarted: The course was added to the background generation queue

courseTasks.title: Course generation tasks
courseTasks.emptyHelp: New course generation will appear here.
courseTasks.select: Select a task to view generation details.
courseTasks.pauseKeepDraftHelp: Stops the current model call. Saved content drafts are kept and resume continues from them.
courseTasks.pauseRestartStepHelp: Stops the current model call. Resume continues from the latest complete artifact and reruns the unfinished step.
courseTasks.deleteActiveConfirm: This stops background generation and deletes the unpublished course, drafts, and task workspace. This cannot be undone.
courseTasks.deleteTaskConfirm: This deletes the unpublished course, drafts, and task workspace. This cannot be undone.
courseTasks.deleteRecordConfirm: The task record and generation workspace will be cleared. The published course will remain available.
courseTasks.staleStateCleared: A stale local generation state was cleared because no matching server task exists. Create the course again.

phases.questionAnalysis: Analyzing what each question actually assesses
phases.contentValidation: Validating course content and question quality
phases.releaseReady: Waiting for quality and release confirmation

blueprint.title: Confirm course outline
blueprint.help: Confirm the sections, sequence, and objectives. The knowledge blueprint starts only after confirmation.
blueprint.noNodes: No editable nodes were returned. Refresh and try again.
blueprint.loadFailed: Could not load the course blueprint. Refresh and try again.
blueprint.confirmed: Outline confirmed. Section knowledge packages and content are now generating in the background.

workflow.label: Six-step course generation workflow
workflow.reopenHint: Return to edit the course outline. Later steps will be rebuilt from the new outline.
workflow.reopenConfirm: Returning to the outline invalidates the knowledge blueprint, teaching plan, course content, and release checks. They will be regenerated from the new outline.
workflow.reopened: Returned to the outline. Edit it and confirm again.

review.requirementsHelp: Confirm the requirements for this course generation run.
review.knowledgeHelp: Confirm the concepts, skills, and relationships this course will teach before lesson design begins.
review.teachingHelp: Confirm how each lesson explains, demonstrates, and practices the material before full content is generated.
review.contentHelp: Review the complete course in the learning workspace before final release checks begin.
review.releaseHelp: Review quality and source-chain checks. The course can publish only when all checks pass.
review.sectionResponsibilitiesHelp: The course-wide boundaries are fixed first so an earlier section cannot consume material reserved for a later section.
review.standardTeachingPlan: Explanation, examples, and practice are organized around this lesson objective
review.blockPlanSummary: {blocks} course blocks · {preference} by preference · {difficulty} by difficulty
review.contentReadyHelp: Open the course to review each lesson, then return here to confirm the content.
review.questionReviewHelp: The system first determines what each question actually assesses, then checks whether it truly matches this course's knowledge, skills, and misconceptions.
review.sourceChain: The outline, knowledge blueprint, teaching plan, and content were checked against their confirmed revisions.
review.confirmed: Step confirmed. Course generation is continuing in the background
review.loadFailed: Could not load this review step. Refresh and try again.

problem.failed: Generation stopped and can resume from its checkpoint
problem.failedHelp: Resuming preserves completed content and interrupted drafts instead of creating a duplicate course.
problem.qualityBlocked: Content was generated but did not pass quality checks
problem.qualityBlockedHelp: Repeating generation will not automatically fix the same quality issue. Review the result before applying a targeted improvement.
problem.unavailable: The original task has no usable checkpoint
problem.unavailableHelp: The system will not blindly rerun this legacy task because that could overwrite existing content.
problem.conflictHelp: Keep the current content, refresh the task, then decide whether to continue or cancel.
problem.warning: The course completed with quality warnings
problem.warningHelp: Continue repairing failed nodes or open the available course content now.

recovery.outlineCheckpoint: The course outline is preserved and can resume at section knowledge generation

inlineRecords.open: View the learning record at this text
inlineRecords.placeholder: Write your understanding beside the source text
inlineRecords.empty: This record has no content yet

adaptiveBlocks.informal: Self-check first; does not count toward mastery
adaptiveBlocks.animationFallbackAvailable: Every keyframe can be paused. Static steps remain available if dynamic rendering fails.
adaptiveBlocks.animationFallback: A verifiable step-by-step fallback is shown. The learning sequence remains available when dynamic rendering is unavailable.

reasons.confirmed_gap_under_remediation: The current gap has been confirmed
reasons.remediation_ready_for_independent_valida: Remediation is ready for independent validation
reasons.repeated_independent_practice_failure: Repeated independent errors on the same objective

courseEvolution.title: Course growth
courseEvolution.diagnosisFallback: Multiple evidence traces point to the same understanding gap
courseEvolution.validationFallback: Use a later formal task on the same ability to validate the adaptation
courseEvolution.protected: Only the selected scope in this course changes; other courses, past answers, and original notes stay unchanged

scope.label: Choose the course boundary this request may affect
scope.currentSectionHint: AI can only find targets in this section
scope.wholeCourseHint: AI interprets the request and matches relevant nodes
scope.currentSummary: AI will only handle these roles in this section: {roles}

review.title: Confirm every node identified by AI
review.interpretationFallback: AI located the relevant nodes in this course from your request.
review.aiUnderstandsDetail: It decides whether your request targets examples, reasoning, concepts, or checks.
review.systemGuardsDetail: Only legal nodes in this course are matched; everything else stays unchanged.
review.youDecideDetail: Include or exclude each item, then update the course once.
review.atomicNotice: The formal course stays unchanged until submission; only checked nodes are applied.
review.nodeListHint: Each item maps to a real course block
review.footerGuard: Unchecked nodes, other teaching roles, other courses, and prior learning records stay unchanged.

courseEvolution.applied: A new course version is active
courseEvolution.navigatorMarkerDetail: This location is within a pending course change scope
courseEvolution.navigatorAppliedDetail: The current course was updated and is waiting for formal validation
courseEvolution.navigatorValidatedDetail: Later formal evidence supports this course change
courseEvolution.navigatorReviewDetail: Later evidence indicates that this course change needs review
courseEvolution.formalEyebrow: Course version shaped by learning evidence
courseEvolution.formalEvidence: Its evidence is traceable and later learning will validate the effect

animationChallenge.prompt: When calculating ABv, which transformation order is correct?
animationChallenge.correct: Correct. B acts on v first, then A acts on Bv.
animationChallenge.wrong: The order is reversed. Start with the transformation closest to v and try again.

sectionGrowth.placeholder: Example: Make every later example more detailed.
sectionGrowth.masteryPreserved: Prior mastery stays recorded. Higher-challenge candidates update the course only after confirmation.
sectionGrowth.boundMaterialsOnly: This generation will use only the sources already bound to this course and allowed for factual use.
sectionGrowth.currentSourcesRequired: This request involves recent, frontier, or current industry facts and needs trusted time-sensitive sources. The candidate will not present model memory as industry evidence.
sectionGrowth.materialsRequired: This request needs trusted sources. Until they are bound, the candidate will only create a teaching framework that does not depend on external facts.
sectionGrowth.sameSourcePassed: Same-source check passed: every candidate remains bound to its section's knowledge, skills, and mastery criteria

effects.effective: New evidence supports the diagnosis; transfer will keep being observed
effects.harmful: Later evidence shows side effects; rollback is recommended
effects.insufficient: Waiting for a later formal task on the same ability

learningDock.title: Learning tools

learningDock.resourceDomainHint: Switch knowledge library and teaching resources
learningDock.resourceGroupHint: Open the knowledge library and teaching resources
learningDock.resourceMenuHelp: Knowledge library and supporting course materials
learningDock.assistantHint: Open the AI teacher on this page
learningDock.notebookHint: View notes and learning markers for this course
learningDock.mistakeBookHint: View formal practice that was not passed or still needs reinforcement
learningDock.recordsHint: View notes, Q&A, and review items for this course
learningDock.recordsDescription: View notes, Q&A, and review items
learningDock.practiceHint: Open the formal practice for this chapter
learningDock.practiceDescription: Complete formal practice for this chapter
learningDock.practiceUnavailableVisible: No formal practice in this section
learningDock.practiceUnavailable: No formal practice is available for this chapter yet
learningDock.statsHint: View reading, mastery, and formal learning evidence
learningDock.statsDescription: View reading, mastery, and learning evidence
learningDock.knowledgeLibraryHint: View subject knowledge and course coverage
learningDock.knowledgeDescription: View this course's knowledge structure and coverage
learningDock.teachingDescription: View outlines, lesson plans, and handouts
learningDock.resourcesHint: View the outline, lesson plan, handout, practice sheet, and slides compiled from this course

courseWorkspaceTabs.practiceHint: Open formal practice for the current chapter
courseWorkspaceTabs.practiceRepairHint: Open practice and rebuild legacy questions
courseWorkspaceTabs.practiceUnavailable: No formal practice is available for this chapter yet

teachingRepresentations.title: Course teaching resources
teachingRepresentations.empty: No teaching resources are available yet
teachingRepresentations.sourceSummary: Compiled from this course · {count} precise bindings
teachingRepresentations.staleNotice: The course changed and these units need to be synced
teachingRepresentations.courseCandidateReady: A course change is ready for impact review
teachingRepresentations.representationSaved: The current PPT was updated and the course text stayed unchanged
teachingRepresentations.preciseImpactSummary: {affected} units will update; {unaffected} will remain unchanged
teachingRepresentations.unrelatedProtected: Content without a source dependency will not change
teachingRepresentations.syncFallback: Course updated; teaching resources remain on the last usable version
teachingRepresentations.changeRejected: The course meaning change was not applied

impactDialog.analyzing: Understanding what teaching goal this edit changes…
impactDialog.title: The system understood this teaching change
impactDialog.description: The system identifies the changed learning evidence and traces its exact same-source dependencies.
impactDialog.preciseDependency: Reasoned from source and teaching-role dependencies
impactDialog.sourceVerified: No rewrite needed; the source revision was revalidated
impactDialog.moreAffected: {count} more related locations follow the same rule
impactDialog.protectedDescription: Sections, materials, and historical facts without a shared source dependency are not regenerated
impactDialog.confirmTitle: The sync scope is ready for teacher confirmation
impactDialog.confirmDescription: The course source has not changed yet. Confirmation rebuilds only dependent content.
impactDialog.completedDescription: These are the real before/after differences and the locations verified without a rewrite.

slides.aiPrompt: Review this slide from its learning goal, knowledge evidence, and visual communication, then suggest concrete improvements.

knowledgeLibrary.title: Knowledge library
knowledgeLibrary.subtitle: Explore atomic knowledge, skills, and relations along the course path
knowledgeLibrary.qualityBlocked: Regeneration completed but failed the quality gates
knowledgeLibrary.upgradeIncomplete: The knowledge library upgrade is not ready yet. The course and legacy structure remain unchanged. Please try again later.
knowledgeLibrary.upgradeTitle: This course knowledge library needs an upgrade
knowledgeLibrary.upgradeDescription: The course remains available. Upgrading will rebuild atomic knowledge, skills, misconceptions, and mastery criteria.
knowledgeLibrary.loadingHint: Course paths, atomic knowledge, skills, misconceptions, and mastery criteria load together
knowledgeLibrary.loadFailed: The knowledge library could not be loaded
knowledgeLibrary.empty: This course does not have a knowledge library yet
knowledgeLibrary.emptyDescription: The knowledge library will appear here after the course content is generated.
knowledgeLibrary.treeViewHint: Browse hierarchy and details along the course path
knowledgeLibrary.graphViewHint: Explore relations enabled in the current version
knowledgeLibrary.graphAriaLabel: Enabled relations between knowledge points in the current course
knowledgeLibrary.graphNoSelectedRelations: This knowledge point currently has no direct semantic relation
knowledgeLibrary.graphSelectPointHint: View its relation direction, target, and rationale
knowledgeLibrary.graphEmpty: The current version has no atomic knowledge points to display
knowledgeLibrary.graphEmptyHint: The complete node set and compiled relations appear here after the knowledge blueprint is generated
knowledgeLibrary.noResults: No matching knowledge point was found in this scope
knowledgeLibrary.learningActions: What you should be able to do
knowledgeLibrary.criterionFallback: Complete the mastery check for this knowledge point
knowledgeLibrary.selectPoint: Select a knowledge point to view details
knowledgeLibrary.unsupported: This course is not connected to course knowledge base v2 yet
knowledgeLibrary.descriptionFallback: This node organizes the current course path and knowledge semantics.

courseBlocks.practiceHint: Formal tasks open here and save progress automatically

feedbackReview.title: Review item by item
feedbackReview.hint: Complete the task first, then reveal the reference and criteria

learningVersionTransition.title: Confirm course version change
learningVersionTransition.summary: The course will move to {version}. Your reading position will be remapped; {attempts} unfinished attempts will become historical; {workflows} diagnostic workflows will become historical; {records} learning records will be preserved.
learningVersionTransition.completed: Version change handled. You can continue learning.
learningVersionTransition.failed: Could not handle the version change. Refresh and try again.

empty.title: Start your learning journey
empty.detail: Create your first course and let AI build a complete course structure.

dialog.title: AI course generation
dialog.subtitle: Build a personalized course structure with AI
dialog.topicHelp: Describe the learning topic here; control difficulty, structure, and source boundaries below.

workspace.contentWillAppear: The outline and lesson text will appear as real generation results arrive

guided.title: Build the course in six steps
guided.help: The system pauses after each step for your review before continuing.

form.topicPlaceholder: For example: quantum mechanics, Python programming, Western philosophy...
form.compositionStyleHelp: Controls how examples, reasoning, applications, and project blocks are distributed
form.strategyHelp: Fine-tune how the course is organized and how source materials guide generation.
form.requirementsPlaceholder: For example: emphasize historical development or include more code examples...

regeneration.defaultRequirement: Regenerate this node while preserving the course difficulty contract and teaching structure

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.detail: Balances explanation, examples, action, and feedback
balanced.rhythm: Goal → Explanation → Demonstration or application → Learner action → Feedback

theoryDriven.label: Theory-driven
theoryDriven.detail: Adds reasoning chains, boundaries, and counterexamples
theoryDriven.rhythm: Concept → Deep reasoning → Boundary test → Example → Practice feedback

exampleDriven.label: Case practice
exampleDriven.detail: Adds typical examples and realistic application blocks
exampleDriven.rhythm: Explanation → Additional example → Realistic scenario → Learner action → Feedback

projectDriven.label: Project-driven
projectDriven.detail: Adds project tasks and deliverables as the course progresses
projectDriven.rhythm: Scenario → Essential knowledge → Project task → Execution feedback → Transfer

inquiryDriven.label: Inquiry-driven
inquiryDriven.detail: Organizes blocks around questions, hypotheses, reasoning, and tests
inquiryDriven.rhythm: Key question → Hypothesis and concept → Evidence reasoning → Boundary test → Reflection

pedagogy.label: Teaching structure
pedagogy.autoHint: Auto selection uses the topic, learning purpose, and materials to choose an appropriate structure.
pedagogy.manualHint: The course blueprint and content will follow the selected teaching structure.

materials.label: Reference materials
materials.subtitle: Upload textbooks, notes, or questions to ground the generated course
materials.dropTitle: Drop files here or choose from your computer
materials.supportHint: Supports PDF, Office, Markdown, and common text formats, up to 50 MB per file
materials.emptyHelp: Materials are uploaded and parsed before they are used as course evidence.
materials.namePlaceholder: Material name, for example: Lecture 03 - Derivatives.pptx
materials.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the material, its author, and how the system should use it
materials.contentPlaceholder: Optional: paste key text, an outline, questions, or lecture excerpts
materials.tooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {max} MB
materials.emptyFile: This file is empty. Choose a file that contains content
materials.duplicateFile: This file is already in the list
materials.contentRequired: Material content is empty or has not been uploaded

generationMode.reviewHelp: Confirm the outline and objectives before content generation
generationMode.fastHelp: Complete the whole course using the current settings

outline.title: Generating outline
outline.detail: AI is analyzing the course structure...

messages.cancelConfirm: Cancel this task? An unpublished new course will be removed, while a published course will stay available.
messages.customInstructionPlaceholder: For example: add more code examples or emphasize practical applications...

courseGeneration.progressVaries: Time varies with material volume and parsing complexity

smartBar.noNotes: No notes yet. Select text to add one.

changeProposals.title: Base-course changes
changeProposals.awaitingGeneration: This item is waiting to be regenerated. Refresh later or contact an administrator.
changeProposals.kgNodeReviewOnly: This suggestion concerns a knowledge node. Accepting it only records a review note and does not rewrite the formal definition.
changeProposals.synced: Base course and teaching resources synchronized
changeProposals.syncFallback: Base course updated; previous teaching resources retained
changeProposals.syncFallbackDetail: The rebuild failed quality checks. The previous version remains available and is marked stale.

practice.title: Formal practice
practice.empty: No quality-approved practice is available for this scope
practice.answerPlaceholder: Show your process, evidence, and result checks
practice.invalidated: This question version changed. Your draft is preserved; start again to continue.
practice.notMasteryEvidence: Not used as current mastery evidence
practice.hintThreeImpact: A level-three hint means this attempt cannot prove mastery on its own. Continue?
practice.hintTwoImpact: A level-two hint marks this result as supported work. Continue?
practice.submitFailed: Submission failed. Check the connection and try again.
practice.solutionImpact: After viewing the full solution, this result no longer counts as independent mastery evidence. Continue?

headline.diagnostic: Identify the cause before drawing conclusions from an error
headline.remediation: Repair only the confirmed local issue
headline.validation: Use an unseen task to verify the repair independently

workflow.resolvedBody: The diagnostic case is closed. Return to the original course objective.
workflow.needsSupportTitle: Current evidence cannot support further automatic remediation
workflow.needsSupportBody: The record is preserved for the AI tutor to review with the full process.

fit.MISS: Not yet covered by current targets

targetedRetry.title: Targeted practice for this mistake
targetedRetry.alternateHint: A different formal question sharing the same misconception or skill was selected
targetedRetry.sameHint: No equivalent alternative is active, so the original question will be used for reinforcement
targetedRetry.unavailable: The original question is no longer active in this course version
targetedRetry.failed: Targeted practice could not be started. Try again shortly.

practiceRuntime.resumeUnavailableTitle: The previous learning task has changed
practiceRuntime.resumeUnavailableBody: No other task was opened. Return to the course and choose the next step from the refreshed learning state.

mastery.title: Objective mastery
mastery.noMisconceptions: No misconception asset for this objective

blueprint.title: Course blueprint
blueprint.confirmHelp: Confirmation continues the waiting job; completed courses use an isolated candidate for local regeneration.

versions.title: Course versions
versions.select: Select a historical version to compare with the current version
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore creates a new version and keeps later versions.

learningSession.title: Learning state
learningSession.contentUpdated: Course content changed; moved to the matching section

reasons.course_version_changed: The course changed. Confirm how unfinished work relates to the new version.
reasons.active_diagnostic: The cause is still being diagnosed; finish this evidence chain first.
reasons.active_remediation: A confirmed local issue has unfinished remediation.
reasons.active_validation: Remediation is complete and needs an unseen independent validation task.
reasons.active_needs_support: Automatic judgment stopped and needs review of the full process.
reasons.unfinished_practice_attempt: The server has an unfinished formal practice draft.
reasons.user_marked_blocker: You marked an issue as blocking this chapter.
reasons.chapter_issue_remaining: This chapter still has a saved unresolved question.
reasons.required_prerequisite_needs_attention: A required prerequisite has reliable current evidence that needs attention.
reasons.prerequisite_needs_attention: A prerequisite has current evidence that needs attention.
reasons.prerequisite_not_verified: A prerequisite is not formally verified, but this does not block entry.
reasons.saved_reading_position: Your saved reading position was restored.
reasons.reading_not_started: This is the first objective in the chapter that has not started.
reasons.reading_in_progress: This objective has started and needs explicit reading completion.
reasons.mastery_not_checked: Reading is complete, but there is no formal mastery evidence.
reasons.mastery_evidence_insufficient: Current evidence is insufficient to verify mastery.
reasons.mastery_partial: Some criteria are verified; finish the remaining checks.
reasons.mastery_needs_review: Current formal evidence shows that this objective needs reinforcement.
reasons.current_chapter_review_due: A review task in this chapter is due.
reasons.chapter_ready_to_advance: This chapter meets the course progression contract.
reasons.course_learning_path_complete: You have reached the end of the course learning path.

notices.other_chapter_workflow_active: Another chapter has unfinished diagnosis or remediation
notices.other_chapter_attempt_active: Another chapter has an unfinished practice attempt
notices.prerequisite_not_verified: An external prerequisite is not verified
notices.review_tasks_due: A review is due but will not preempt the current task
notices.practice_waiting_for_review: One practice attempt is pending review

courseWorkspace.explainContinuity: Ask AI to explain this step

learningOverview.title: Learning overview
learningOverview.unavailableBody: Course reading and practice remain available. Try again later.
learningOverview.noEvidence: Complete a reading confirmation, formal practice, or saved learning record before the system forms an evidence-backed judgment.
learningOverview.policy: This overview is recalculated only from formal evidence. Reading is not mastery, and AI conversations do not directly change these conclusions.

supportReason.active_diagnostic: A specific issue is being diagnosed
supportReason.formal_evidence_needs_review: Current formal assessment indicates review is needed
supportReason.repeated_independent_failure: Multiple independent attempts have not passed
supportReason.single_formal_failure_insufficient: One failed attempt is not enough to infer a stable weakness
supportReason.no_current_support_need: No current evidence requires extra support
supportReason.insufficient_evidence: Current evidence is insufficient for a judgment

aiTeacher.title: AI tutor
aiTeacher.emptyTitle: Start from the current learning context
aiTeacher.emptyBody: Start with a concept, problem, or course passage that is still unclear.
aiTeacher.offline: Network unavailable. Cached conversations remain visible.
aiTeacher.quickExplainPrompt: Explain the current content in a simpler way.
aiTeacher.quickExamplePrompt: Give a concrete example based on the current content.
aiTeacher.explainRuntimePrompt: Explain why I should take this learning action now and cite the evidence:

inlineAi.open: Open AI for this content block
inlineAi.autoLocal: Added to the lesson and waiting to sync
inlineAi.askHint: Ask a question about this content block.
inlineAi.saveFailed: The lesson record has not synced yet. Try again.
inlineAi.feedbackPrompt: Did this answer resolve your question?
inlineAi.feedbackFailed: Feedback was not recorded. Try again.
inlineAi.explainPrompt: Explain this course block in a more approachable way using only its current content.
inlineAi.examplePrompt: Give one concrete, checkable example for this course block.
inlineAi.simplifyPrompt: Explain this course block more concisely without changing its meaning.

blockRegeneration.interruptedHelp: The request and checkpoint were preserved and can resume directly.
blockRegeneration.retryFailed: The candidate could not resume. Try again shortly.
blockRegeneration.applied: Applied to the canonical course content
blockRegeneration.stale: Course changed; generate a new candidate
blockRegeneration.placeholder: Describe how this block should improve
blockRegeneration.defaultInstruction: Make this block more accurate and clear while preserving its connection to adjacent content.
blockRegeneration.generateFailed: Candidate generation failed. Try again shortly.
blockRegeneration.applyFailed: Candidate could not be applied. Generate a new one.

failures.processInterrupted: The generation service stopped. Resume from this candidate.
failures.providerError: The generation service is temporarily unavailable. Resume shortly.
failures.requestCancelled: The previous generation was cancelled. Resume from this candidate.
failures.revisionConflict: The course content changed. Start a new improvement request.

gates.content_present: Candidate content is empty or too short
gates.content_changed: Candidate does not differ materially from the original
gates.generation_clean: Candidate contains a generation error or refusal marker
gates.safe_length: Candidate exceeds the safe block length
gates.payload_preserved: Candidate lost non-content data from the original block
gates.code_fence_preserved: Candidate did not preserve valid closed code fences

records.title: Learning records
records.saveUnavailable: This answer has no course location to save
records.locationMissing: Could not locate the selected lesson
records.emptyHint: Select course text to add a note or handle it later

courseAvailability.rebuildingQuestions: Generating questions through the current pipeline
courseAvailability.rebuildQuestionsHelp: Rebuilds the question bank, question revisions, and formal-practice contracts from the current course objectives. Previous attempts are preserved.
courseAvailability.rebuildQuestionsSuccess: Questions were generated through the current pipeline and are ready for formal practice.
courseAvailability.rebuildQuestionsFailed: Question generation failed. The legacy bank and attempt history were not overwritten. Try again later.

declared_reading_only.title: This course is intentionally reading-only
declared_reading_only.body: No formal questions were generated. Reading progress remains available, but it does not verify mastery.

legacy_reading_compatible.title: This is a legacy-compatible course
legacy_reading_compatible.body: You can continue reading, but the legacy course has no traceable formal practice or mastery evidence.

required_practice_missing.title: Course practice assets need repair
required_practice_missing.body: This standard course should include formal questions. Missing assets are not treated as reading-only mode.

no_questions_in_scope.title: No formal practice in this scope
no_questions_in_scope.body: Other course sections may still have questions. Switch sections or return to the course to continue.

mastery.readingOnlyTitle: This course provides reading and self-check only
mastery.readingOnlyBody: Self-confirmation can support review, but it does not count as system-verified mastery.
mastery.compatibilityTitle: This legacy course has no formal mastery verification
mastery.compatibilityBody: Reading remains available, but the system will not infer mastery from legacy data.
mastery.blockedBody: Formal mastery checks are incomplete. Self-checks will not replace formal evidence.

continuity.requiredPracticeMissing: Required formal practice is missing, so the system stopped before opening an empty mastery check.

mistakeNotebook.title: Mistake book
mistakeNotebook.unavailable: The mistake book is temporarily unavailable
mistakeNotebook.emptyHint: Formal practice that was not passed or lacks sufficient evidence will appear here automatically.
mistakeNotebook.saved: Your answer and its assessment have been preserved
mistakeNotebook.retryUnavailable: The original question is no longer in the current course version
mistakeNotebook.retryFailed: Could not start the targeted retry. Please try again later.

quickNote.title: Quick note
quickNote.placeholder: Capture an idea, question, or review point…
